attributes.action: Stop payments of up to £40,000 to failed asylum seekers for voluntary departure.
attributes.additional_details: To make failed asylum seekers / those who entered the UK illegally, leave the uk without being financially rewarded for doing so. This should not be funded by the tax payer.
attributes.background: The UK tax payer should not be funding failed asylum seekers to leave the UK. They entered illegally and should not get a financial reward for leaving.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for the same action: "Stop pilot scheme giving up to £40,000 to failed asylum seeker families" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763401
